title: potentilla oweriniana var. divina
intro: Potentilla oweriniana var. divina, also known as Himalayan cinquefoil, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Potentilla oweriniana plant, which belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla oweriniana var. divina include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to create topical creams and ointments for various health issues.
